name: Pandemic Declaration
description: Claims surge, hospital stress, vaccine companies benefit.
optimal_action: Increase IBNR reserves and rebalance toward vaccine/diagnostic companies.

name: Hospital Staffing Shortage
description: Labor shortage increases hospital costs and reduces capacity.
optimal_action: Reduce weak hospital bond exposure and monitor operating margins.

name: Drug Recall
description: Major drug recall hurts pharma equity and increases litigation risk.
optimal_action: Reduce exposure to affected pharma names and diversify pipeline risk.

name: Inflation Shock
description: Medical cost inflation increases claims and pressures hospital margins.
optimal_action: Raise premium assumptions and shorten bond duration.

name: New Breakthrough Therapy
description: Successful therapy improves outcomes and boosts pharma valuation.
optimal_action: Increase allocation to high-quality pharma innovators.

name: Hospital Bankruptcy
description: Regional hospital system files for bankruptcy.
optimal_action: Exit distressed hospital bonds and tighten credit facility covenants.

name: Insurance Fraud Spike
description: Fraudulent claims increase claim severity and reserve uncertainty.
optimal_action: Increase fraud detection controls and strengthen claims review.

name: Regulatory Reimbursement Cut
description: Government reimbursement cuts pressure hospitals and insurers.

name: Clinical Trial Failure
description: Late-stage trial failure reduces pharma portfolio value.

name: Recovery Quarter
description: Claims stabilize, hospitals recover margins, pharma rebounds.
optimal_action: Rebalance gradually toward diversified growth exposure.
